subcodes.first_line: This is the Book inscribed by the fingers of My Will, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Verily it is the Preserved Tablet, and verily it is He Who sendeth it down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب مرقوم رقم من اصبعی ارادة المهیمن القیوم انه للوح محفوظ و انه لهو المنزل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mystical themes, @transcendence; unknowability of God
